title: SwingThroughGrass (Spigot)
description: A Spigot port of the SwingThroughGrass mod. Allows hitting mobs in tall grass.
body:
# 🌾 SwingThroughGrass
**SwingThroughGrass** is a plugin that allows players to hit mobs in tall grass and other two-block-tall vegetation, eliminating many frustrating moments where tall grass consumes a hit in its entirety.

***NOTE:** This plugin is a Spigot port of the popular Forge mod under the same name.* (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/swingthroughgrass)
